Cypress Fictional Finance advertises the Cypress Travel Blend Card.
New personal cardmembers can earn 20,000 Cypress points plus a $100 travel statement credit after $2,500 in purchases in the first 120 days.
The first-year annual fee is waived; after that the annual fee is $89.
The card network shown is American Express.
Offer expires August 31, 2026.
Points and the travel statement credit may post separately after qualifying purchases are verified.
